QUALITY

Quality is Our Foundation

We are committed to delivering safe, effective, and high-quality pharmaceutical products. Our quality systems are built around international regulatory expectations.

What Science Can Do — Advancing Healthcare Worldwide

QUALITY PHILOSOPHY

Built on Quality, Driven by Compliance

At Raysun Biopharma, quality is not a department — it is embedded in every aspect of our operations. From facility design to final product release, our quality management system ensures that every product meets the highest standards of safety, efficacy, and purity.

Zero tolerance for quality deviations
Continuous improvement culture
Data-driven decision making
Regulatory-first mindset

Quality Control Laboratory

CERTIFICATIONS & ACCREDITATIONS

Internationally Recognized Standards

WHO GMP

Good Manufacturing Practice

All production lines certified to World Health Organization GMP standards.

ISO 9001:2015

Quality Management System

Systematic approach to quality management covering all processes.

ISO 14001

Environmental Management

Commitment to environmentally responsible manufacturing.

QUALITY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM

Comprehensive QA Framework

Document Control

Comprehensive SOP management with version control and electronic approval workflows

Change Control

Structured change management process for facilities, processes, and documentation

CAPA System

Corrective and Preventive Action system for continuous quality improvement

Training Management

Competency-based training program for all manufacturing and quality personnel

Supplier Qualification

Rigorous supplier audit and qualification program for raw materials and packaging

Batch Record Review

100% review of batch manufacturing records prior to product release

QUALITY CONTROL LABORATORY

Advanced Analytical Capabilities

Chemical Analysis

  • HPLC & UPLC Systems
  • UV-Vis Spectrophotometry
  • Dissolution Testing (USP)
  • Karl Fischer titration

Physical Testing

  • Friability & Hardness Testing
  • Particle Size Analysis
  • Disintegration testing

Microbiological Testing

  • Bioburden testing
  • Sterility testing
  • Endotoxin (LAL) testing

Stability Studies

  • ICH-compliant stability chambers
  • Accelerated stability
  • Photostability testing

REGULATORY AFFAIRS

Multi-Market Registration

Laos (FDA)

Registered

Thailand (FDA)

In Progress

Cambodia (MOH)

Registered

Vietnam (DAV)

Planned

Myanmar (FDA)

In Progress
